steps.trigger: baseline — palisade built on summer-gathering meadow; first ranging cut sign across bear-line track
Toren and Halric pushed deep east searching for Bren — oracle bane locked in 'No, and...' on whether they were unobserved
Hold dispatched second scout (Halric again) into the same eastern range despite no contact attempt with the bear-line
Toren's first apprenticeship session — Kenric sketches a preliminary density grid
Kenric extends the grid south after Toren's report of bright-Glim near the bear-stone
Kenric notices the brightness pattern is centered slightly east of the bear-stone — not natural geography

second-scout-missing.name: Halric overdue from the eastern ridge

steps.trigger: Halric failed to return by sundown
no signal-fire visible from the watchtower at second watch

completed.name: Captain Daven's assessment of Toren
completed.resolution: Toren passed. Captain granted ranging permission within a half-day of the Hold and assigned her to the Bren search detail. Trust is provisional, not warm. The captain noted in her journal: 'Quiet. Watches more than she speaks. Useful.'

steps.trigger: first formal interview — Toren answered short and honest
joined the captain on a wall-walk; identified two flaws in the watch rotation
stood her ground when the captain pressed about Glim apprenticeship — boon on disposition oracle softened the captain's response
